falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 index closes above 5,200 for 3 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sustained breakout above this key resistance level would invalidate the 'HOLD' signal by confirming a bullish trend contrary to the bottoming pattern assumption.

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume on the NASDAQ exceeds 2.5 billion shares/day for 5 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate extreme market participation and potential blowoff momentum, contradicting the 'HOLD' phase's expectation of consolidation.

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score metric rises above 50 within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score exceeding this threshold would directly contradict the current 'HOLD' signal by confirming extreme overbought conditions rather than a consolidation phase.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
